state_snapshot.overall_goal: Build the AliceGeminiClient from scratch to extract mathematically pristine 4K G-Buffer stencils (Beauty, Depth, Segmentation) and POST them asynchronously to the Gemini 3 Flash API.
state_snapshot.active_constraints: - SECURITY/TECH: OpenSSL and simdjson are strictly BANNED. Use OS-native TLS (SChannel/CPPHTTPLIB_USE_SCHANNEL) and custom string parsing. - PERFORMANCE: 0ms blocking latency on main thread; zero heap allocations (std::string/vector) in the hot rendering loop. - ARCHITECTURE: Mirror SelectionContext.h; register all 6 extern "C" callbacks without the 'inline' keyword to ensure strong symbol emission. - RENDERING: 4K FBO (3840x2160), NO MSAA. MRTs: GL_RGBA16F (Beauty), GL_RGB8 (Segmentation), GL_DEPTH_COMPONENT32F (Depth). - VISUAL: drawGrid(50.0f) must be visible in the 100x100 unit grid from default "Perspective" camera. - MEMORY: 128MB Arena (Alice::g_Arena) with mandatory nullptr/capacity checks.
state_snapshot.key_knowledge: - Vcpkg Baseline: Resolved by using valid commit `67f167b2f7c170f83688919c90edcd896239330e`. Target triplet is x64-windows-static. - Arena Stability: 512MB allocation failed on native host; reverted to 128MB. Added fatal check on g_Arena.memory to prevent abort() on allocation failure. - Phantom Pointers: stbiWriteToArena fix prevents offset incrementing on failure (checks arena->offset + size > arena->capacity before allocate()). - Worker Armor: Entire worker thread loop is wrapped in try/catch to prevent networking/STL exceptions from triggering global std::terminate(). - PBO Ring: g_State.isFirstFrame skip protects worker thread from frame-0 incompressible noise. - Depth Stencil: depthPngStart offset must be captured AFTER allocating depth8 conversion buffer to prevent file corruption in disk dumps.
state_snapshot.artifact_trail: - `vcpkg.json`: Configured with cpp-httplib, stb, and opennurbs overlay. - `include/AliceGeminiClient.h`: - 4K FBO/PBO Ring Implementation. - Bespoke zero-allocation Base64 encoder. - Worker thread with try/catch exception handling and latency metrics. - GridRenderer (VBO-based) for high-res FBO captures. - `src/sketch.cpp`: Enabled ALICEGEMINICLIENT_RUN_TEST.
state_snapshot.file_system_state: - CWD: `C:\Users\shajay.b.ZAHA-HADID\source\repos\alice-viewer-opennurbs` - BUILD ARTIFACTS: `./build/beauty_4k.png`, `./build/seg_4k.png`, `./build/depth_4k.png`. - BINARY: `build/bin/AliceViewer.exe` linked successfully with zero linker/compiler errors.
state_snapshot.recent_actions: - Reverted arena expansion to 128MB and implemented fatal safety checks for malloc failure. - Fixed phantom pointer vulnerability in stbiWriteToArena. - Added CPU heap safety net for large G-Buffer allocations (beautyData/segData/depthData). - Wrapped worker thread in try/catch to prevent networking exceptions from crashing the process. - Fixed depth_4k.png corruption by recalibrating PNG byte stream offsets.
state_snapshot.task_state: 1. [DONE] Scaffold 4K MRT FBO & PBO Ring. 2. [DONE] Implement native Base64 & worker thread workflow. 3. [DONE] Fix memory stability and arena allocation safety. 4. [DONE] Resolve thread-level exceptions and PNG file corruption. 5. [TODO] Final Visual QA of .png disk dumps (Confirming 3840x2160 resolution). 6. [TODO] Implement and verify 0ms blocking latency metrics in draw(). 7. [TODO] Finalize Gemini JSON Response scanner integration.
